fusion_best_p2.note: Phase 2 best val NLL — but OVERFIT, terrible on HPatches

analysis.key_finding: Phase 2 end-to-end training overfits heavily on MegaDepth-1500 (only 1200 train pairs). Best HPatches performance is at P2 epoch 5.
analysis.gap_to_baseline: 2.5pp (46.1 vs 48.6) — fusion slightly hurts on HPatches but adds semantic robustness potential
analysis.phase2_overfitting: Val NLL improves (0.86→0.75) but HPatches degrades (46.1→6.1). MegaDepth NLL doesn't correlate with HPatches homography AUC.
recommendations: Use stronger regularization (dropout, weight decay) in Phase 2
Early stopping based on HPatches validation, not MegaDepth NLL
More training data (full MegaDepth, not 1500 subset)
Freeze more LG layers in Phase 2 (only finetune last 2-3 transformer blocks)
